summary: Iteration 72 - Global UI/UX optimization PASSED. Anti-spam chat, i18n completion, and CSS improvements verified. All 11 backend tests pass. All 3 frontend pages (Homepage, About, Seller Profile) load without errors.
passed_tests: GET /api/feed - PASS (returns posts with has_more pagination)
GET /api/config/countries - PASS (returns dict with country codes)
POST /api/internal-chat/messages - first message to new recipient works
POST /api/internal-chat/messages - second message without reply returns 429 (anti-spam)
UI: 3 info buttons visible (Que es Hispaloshop, Ser Vendedor, Ser Influencer)
UI: FEED and TRENDING sections visible
UI: About page (/about) loads with content
UI: Seller profile (/user/user_testprod001) loads with seller_stats card
UI: Seller stats show 44€ Ventas, 2 Pedidos, 9★ Rating, 23 Productos
critical_code_review_comments: Anti-spam logic correctly blocks second message if conversation status='pending' and sender has 1+ messages while recipient has 0 replies (429 with Spanish error message)
Conversation status changes to 'active' when recipient replies for first time
i18n: ES=1424 keys, KO=1429 keys, EN=1424 keys - all languages complete
CSS improvements in index.css: contrast fixes (#7A→#5A for muted text), button disabled states, focus rings, mobile touch targets (min 44px), loading spinner, toast improvements, error banner styles
InternalMessageCreate model now includes image_url field
Social routes extracted to routes/social.py (modularization complete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified: 1) Anti-spam chat - conversations start as 'pending', sender limited to 1 message until recipient replies (429 error if exceeded). Status becomes 'active' after first reply. Error message in Spanish: 'Este usuario aun no ha respondido. No puedes enviar mas mensajes hasta recibir respuesta.' 2) i18n completed for ES/EN/KO with 1400+ keys each. ES got producer.addresses keys, KO got customer.*, errors.*, productDetail.*, store.* keys. 3) CSS design system improvements in index.css: contrast fixes, button states, focus rings, mobile touch targets, loading spinner, toast/error improvements. 4) All feed/discover/config endpoints work after route modularization.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend
